lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh antar saant hai man tan naam samaae |
lines.english: Within the Gurmukh is peace and tranquility; his mind and body are absorbed in the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਏ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਹਰਿ ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਇਆ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: naanak bhe puneet har teerath naaeaa |26|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are purified, bathing in the sacred shrine of the Lord. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਗਈ ਬਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naam padaarath paaeaa chintaa gee bilaae |
lines.english: He obtains the treasure of the Naam, and his anxiety is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਚਿਤਵੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੜੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naamo chitavai naam parrai naam rahai liv laae |
lines.english: He contemplates the Naam, he studies the Naam, and he remains lovingly absorbed in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai naam aoopajai tisanaa bhukh sabh jaae |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the Naam wells up, and his thirst and hunger are completely relieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਤਿਆ ਨਾਮੋ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naame ratiaa naamo palai paae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, he gathers in the Naam. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੁਰਖਿ ਜਿ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿਆ ਘਰੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਗਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur purakh ji maariaa bhram bhramiaa ghar chhodd geaa |
lines.english: One who is cursed by the True Guru, abandons his home, and wanders around aimlessly.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਪਿਛੈ ਵਜੈ ਫਕੜੀ ਮੁਹੁ ਕਾਲਾ ਆਗੈ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: os pichhai vajai fakarree muhu kaalaa aagai bheaa |
lines.english: He is jeered at, and his face is blackened in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਅਰਲੁ ਬਰਲੁ ਮੁਹਹੁ ਨਿਕਲੈ ਨਿਤ ਝਗੂ ਸੁਟਦਾ ਮੁਆ ॥
lines.translit: os aral baral muhahu nikalai nit jhagoo suttadaa muaa |
lines.english: He babbles incoherently, and foaming at the mouth, he dies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਕਿਸੈ ਹੀ ਦੈ ਕੀਤੈ ਜਾਂ ਧੁਰਿ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਓਸ ਦਾ ਏਹੋ ਜੇਹਾ ਪਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa hovai kisai hee dai keetai jaan dhur kirat os daa eho jehaa peaa |
lines.english: What can anyone do? Such is his destiny, according to his past deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਓਹੁ ਜਾਇ ਤਿਥੈ ਓਹੁ ਝੂਠਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲੇ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jithai ohu jaae tithai ohu jhootthaa koorr bole kisai na bhaavai |
lines.english: Wherever he goes, he is a liar, and by telling lies, he not liked by anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਅਗੋ ਦੇ ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ehu braham beechaar hovai dar saachai ago de jan naanak aakh sunaavai |2|
lines.english: This shall be God's determination in His True Court; servant Nanak predicts and proclaims this. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖਹੁ ਭਾਈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕੀ ਜੈਸਾ ਕੋਈ ਕਰੈ ਤੈਸਾ ਕੋਈ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: vekhahu bhaaee vaddiaaee har santahu suaamee apune kee jaisaa koee karai taisaa koee paavai |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, behold this, the glorious greatness of our Lord and Master, O Saints; as one behaves, so does he receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਬਧਾ ਥੇਹੁ ਰਖਵਾਲੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਦਿਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sachai badhaa thehu rakhavaale gur dite |
lines.english: The True Guru has established the village; the Guru has appointed its guards and protectors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅਪਣੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਅਪਣੇ ਕਰਿ ਲਿਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur apanee kirapaa dhaar apane kar lite |
lines.english: The Guru has showered me with His Mercy, and He has made me His own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਈ ਆਸ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਮਨ ਰਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: pooran hoee aas gur charanee man rate |
lines.english: My hopes are fulfilled, and my mind is imbued with the love of the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਿ ਬੇਅੰਤਿ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਸਭਿ ਹਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kripaal beant avagun sabh hate |
lines.english: The Guru is infinitely merciful; He has erased all my sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ਜਿਸੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਇਤੇ ॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak sad balihaar jis gur ke gun ite |27|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to the Guru, who has countless virtues. ||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੋਆ ਹਾਸਲੁ ਤਦੇ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਬੜਿਆ ਹੰਢਹਿ ਜੀਅ ਕਮਾਂਦੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hukam hoaa haasal tade hoe nibarriaa handteh jeea kamaande |1|
lines.english: When His Command is received, then it is decided; all beings move and act accordingly. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਰਜਾਇ ਲੇਖਿਆ ਪਾਇ ਅਬ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਜੈ ਪਾਂਡੇ ॥
lines.translit: taa kee rajaae lekhiaa paae ab kiaa keejai paandde |
lines.english: By His Command, we receive our pre-ordained rewards; so what can we do now, O Pandit?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਕਿ ਨਥ ਖਸਮ ਹਥ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਧਕੇ ਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: nak nath khasam hath kirat dhake de |
lines.english: The string through the nose is in the hands of the Lord Master; one's own actions drive him on.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹਾ ਦਾਣੇ ਤਹਾਂ ਖਾਣੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਚੁ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jahaa daane tahaan khaane naanakaa sach he |2|
lines.english: Wherever his food is, there he eats it; O Nanak, this is the Truth. ||2||

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਰਚਨੁ ਰਚਾਇ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਘਾਲਿਓਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape rachan rachaae aape hee ghaalion |
lines.english: He Himself created the creation, and He Himself destroys it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਗਲਾ ਆਪਿ ਥਾਟਿ ਬਹਾਲੀਓਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe galaa aap thaatt bahaaleeon |
lines.english: The Lord Himself puts everything in its proper place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਿਓਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape jant upaae aap pratipaalion |
lines.english: He Himself fashions His creatures, and He Himself nourishes them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਰਖੇ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਓਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: daas rakhe kantth laae nadar nihaalion |
lines.english: He hugs His slaves close in His embrace, and blesses them with His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਭਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ਜਾਲਿਓਨੁ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak bhagataa sadaa anand bhaau doojaa jaalion |28|
lines.english: O Nanak, His devotees are forever in bliss; they have burnt away the love of duality. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਇਕ ਚਿਤਿ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: e man har jee dhiaae too ik man ik chit bhaae |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on the Dear Lord, with single-minded conscious concentration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਦੇਇ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har keea sadaa sadaa vaddiaaeea dee na pachhotaae |
lines.english: The glorious greatness of the Lord shall last forever and ever; He never regrets what He gives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau har kai sad balihaaranai jit seviai sukh paae |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to the Lord; serving Him, peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh mil rahai haumai sabad jalaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh remains merged with the Lord; he burns away his ego through the Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਤਿਨ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaein tin nij ghar vaas hai jug jug sobhaa hoe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abide in the home of their inner being; they are honored throughout the ages. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਮਾ ਪਿਉ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa maa piau aap hai aape saar karee |
lines.english: He Himself is the father and mother of all; He Himself cares for us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape sevaa laaeian aape bakhas karee |
lines.english: He Himself enjoins us to serve Him, and He Himself blesses us with forgiveness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਹਹਿ ਕਰਤੇ ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: too karan kaaran samarath heh karate mai tujh bin avar na koee |
lines.english: You are the Creator, all-powerful, able to do anything. Without You, there is no other at all.
